data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of strong ownership checks, which ensures that users can only share their own sources. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or API reads that confirm this functionality. The linked use case and prior step evidence do not demonstrate any mechanism that enforces ownership checks, indicating a clear gap in the evidence needed to validate this requirement.
gaps: No evidence of strong ownership checks to ensure users can only share their own sources.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
